def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    rsi = ta.momentum.RSIIndicator(df['close'], window=rsi_period).rsi()
    atr = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['close'] > df['close'].shift(1) + atr) & (rsi > 50)] = 1
    signals[(df['close'] < df['close'].shift(1) - atr) & (rsi < 50)] = -1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: EUR/USD exhibits momentum breakout behavior where price exceeding ATR thresholds combined with RSI trend confirmation signals high-probability continuation.
